task_completion.description: Verify that Task 55 has a predecessor link restored.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to make edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking and typing inside the ProjectLibre application interface to edit cells, rather than using a text editor or terminal script to modify the XML directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the application to save the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the ProjectLibre 'Save As' menu or dialog to save the .pod file, rather than just renaming the file in the terminal.

integrity.description: The overall project structure was not destroyed or replaced by a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Gantt chart and task list for the 'Commercial Construction' project remain visible with multiple phases and tasks intact.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original project file is located at /home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml. The task requires fixing 5 specific injected errors in ProjectLibre: Task 8 (duration must be <= 160h or 20 days), Task 17 (duration must be >= 400h or 50 days), Task 39 (lag must be >= 0, removing the unrealistic negative lead time), Task 55 (must have at least one predecessor), and Task 82 (duration must be >= 120h or 15 days). Finally, the project must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/construction_audit_fixed.pod.
